training_status: very active, 4-6x/week weights with progressive overload and inclined treadmill cardio

benefits.description: Lost 55 lbs (270 to 215 lbs) since July 2nd. Continuing fat loss, particularly in abdominal and chest areas. Improved muscle definition visible in arms and abs.
Form improving with visible muscle definition emerging

protocol_notes: Brand: Zepbound. Insurance covering 95% of cost. Low to no carbs, cut out sugar almost entirely, focuses on protein and veggies, loosely tracks calories but not macros/micros. Started July 2, 2025. Seeking to add additional peptide for muscle gain while continuing fat loss.
